summary: V31.2 Creator ecosystem frontend testing complete. Tested all 8 requirements for Creator module interconnection. 7/8 tests passed. One cross-navigation bug found: /soundscapes Related does not include Cosmic Mixer.

integration_issues.issue: /soundscapes Related links do NOT include 'Cosmic Mixer'. Per requirement #7, Cosmic Mixer should be listed in Soundscapes Related for bidirectional navigation.
integration_issues.fix: Add { label: 'Cosmic Mixer', route: '/cosmic-mixer' } to the '/soundscapes' entry in RELATED object (around line 87-92)

action_items: Add Cosmic Mixer to /soundscapes Related links in BackToHub.js (line ~87-92)
critical_code_review_comments: BackToHub.js /soundscapes entry (lines 87-92) is missing Cosmic Mixer in Related links. Current: Frequencies, Meditation, Zen Garden, Music Lounge. Should add: Cosmic Mixer for bidirectional navigation with /cosmic-mixer which already links to Soundscapes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V31.2 Creator ecosystem testing. All Creator modules (Creator Console, Master Engine, Cosmic Mixer, Fabricator, Creator Dashboard) are present in Sovereign Council pillar (18 items). Related links work correctly for all Creator pages. One bug: /soundscapes needs Cosmic Mixer added to Related links for bidirectional navigation.

tests_executed.details: Found: Creator Console, Master Engine, Cosmic Mixer, Fabricator, Creator Dashboard. Pillar shows 18 items.
APEX CREATOR CONSOLE visible, faders present, VAULT soft key present, EXIT button present.

BackToHub.js shows 6 Related items: Master Engine, Cosmic Mixer, Fabricator, Creator Dashboard, Crystal Skins, Economy & Dust. Note: BackToHub is behind full-screen console overlay, but EXIT button works.
Found all 4 expected: Creator Console, Cosmic Mixer, Fabricator, Cosmic Ledger.
Found all 4 expected: Creator Console, Master Engine, Soundscapes, Frequencies.
Found all 4 expected: Creator Console, Creator Dashboard, Crystal Skins, Resource Alchemy.

All 7 pillars show correct counts: Practice(9), Divination(9), Sanctuary(8), Nourish & Heal(8), Explore(9), Sage AI Coach(5), Sovereign Council(18).
Creator Console EXIT button correctly navigates to /sovereign-hub.
Found all 4 expected: Creator Console, Fabricator, Master Engine, Economy & Dust.
